'''Jack Campagnolo''' (born 15 June 1998) is an [[Italy national rugby league team|Italy international]] [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|so}} for the [[Townsville Blackhawks]] in the [[Queensland Cup]].

==Background==
Campagnolo was born in [[Tully, Queensland]], [[Australia]]. He is of [[Italy|Italian]] descent.<ref>[https://www.zerotackle.com/players/jack-campagnlolo/ Zero Tackle profile]{{Dead link|date=July 2025 |bot=InternetArchiveBot |fix-attempted=yes }}</ref>

==Playing career==
===Club career===
Campagnolo played in 21 games, and scored 3 tries for the [[South Sydney Rabbitohs]] in the [[2022 NSW Cup]].{{citation needed|date=January 2024}}

===London Broncos===
On 15 January 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[London Broncos]] in the [[Super League]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=15 Jan 2024|title=London Broncos make eighth new signing for Super League return in shape of Italy World Cup star|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/london-broncos-make-eighth-new-signing-for-super-league-return-in-shape-of-italy-world-cup-star}}</ref>

===International career===
In 2022 Campagnolo was named in the [[2021 Men's Rugby League World Cup squads#Italy|Italy squad]] for the [[2021 Rugby League World Cup – Men's tournament|2021 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/rugby-league-world-cup-2021-squad-lists/ Full list of every squad at the Rugby League World Cup 2021]</ref>
